# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Core Modules

Main application entry points, helper functions for map, assets, domain-based components, and global configuration.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [app](app.qmd#app.app) | Main entry point and UI layout for the BAM Shiny Dashboard. |
| [assets.icons](assets.icons.qmd#app.assets.icons) | UI Asset Icon Library Module. |
| [assets.images](assets.images.qmd#app.assets.images) | Media utility assets and client-side JavaScript injection pipelines. |
| [assets.sounds](assets.sounds.qmd#app.assets.sounds) | Media utility assets and client-side JavaScript injection pipelines. |
| [domain.map](domain.map.qmd#app.domain.map) | Geospatial map helper utilities and vector boundary processing. |
| [domain.charts](domain.charts.qmd#app.domain.charts) | The various chart functions used throughout the project. |
| [domain.birds](domain.birds.qmd#app.domain.birds) | Helper functions related to bird details. |

## Data Loading

Unified data access layer for high-performance Polars pipelines and remote DRAC servers.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [shared.data_loading](shared.data_loading.qmd#app.shared.data_loading) | Data access layer for the BAM dashboard backend. |
| [shared.paths](shared.paths.qmd#app.shared.paths) | Paths to files and folders located in the app directory and remote server. |

## Server Logic

Backend server logic and reactive workflow execution routing.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [server.landbird_v5_server](server.landbird_v5_server.qmd#app.server.landbird_v5_server) | Backend analytical server coordination engine for Landbirds Version 5 models. |

## UI Components

Modular frontend interface elements, page layouts, navigation controls, and view toggle containers.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [ui.components.announcements](ui.components.announcements.qmd#app.ui.components.announcements) | Announcements that are be displayed only when necessary. |
| [ui.components.contact](ui.components.contact.qmd#app.ui.components.contact) | UI contact components for the BAM dashboard. |
| [ui.components.layout](ui.components.layout.qmd#app.ui.components.layout) | UI layout components for the BAM dashboard. |
| [ui.layout.sidebar](ui.layout.sidebar.qmd#app.ui.layout.sidebar) | Sidebar navigation controls and reactive inputs for model tabs. |
| [ui.pages.welcome](ui.pages.welcome.qmd#app.ui.pages.welcome) | Welcome tab layout and announcement sub-components for the dashboard. |
| [ui.pages.methods](ui.pages.methods.qmd#app.ui.pages.methods) | Methods and modeling methodologies layout views. |
| [ui.pages.landbirds_v4](ui.pages.landbirds_v4.qmd#app.ui.pages.landbirds_v4) | Landbirds Version 4 historical model placeholder view template. |
| [ui.pages.landbirds_v5](ui.pages.landbirds_v5.qmd#app.ui.pages.landbirds_v5) | Landbirds Version 5 model layout view. |
| [ui.pages.model_access](ui.pages.model_access.qmd#app.ui.pages.model_access) | Model access layout views, R package vignettes, and citation components. |

## Utilities

Other utility modules including the TiTiler API gateways.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [utils.titiler](utils.titiler.qmd#app.utils.titiler) | The TiTiler mapping gateway: part of the data access layer for the BAM dashboard backend. |
